notes: v1.14.135 - clean icons from separated-source PNGs - REF + Work, no re-cut. Image bytes only: replaced the contents of all 10 card icons (6 Ref: optics/hardware/cli/hwref/know/compass + 4 Work action: deploy-upload/scan-radar/handoff-link/issues-alert) with clean separated-source re-exports (no smudgy floor reflections / hard edges on the rough earlier cuts). Filenames unchanged - all 10 are already referenced in dct-ios.html and already in the sw.js precache array, so NO HTML, CSS, markup, or precache-array changes. Three-stamp version lockstep bumped 134->135 specifically so CACHE_VERSION busts the service worker - without it the SW keeps serving the old cached image bytes and the clean art never reaches the device. Gates: git status = exactly the 10 icon files + the 3 stamp files, node --check sw.js, version.json valid JSON, ?legacy=1 byte-identical (untouched). DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved, cold-aisle): close the tab, reopen, confirm SYS reads v1.14.135, then REF and Work both render the clean icons - no smudge under the chip/terminal/compass, no hard edge on the radar/handoff; Airplane Mode + reload = all paint (precache proof); ?legacy=1 = 5-tab legacy unchanged. HISTORY: v1.14.134 = Icon Stage 2 (4 Work cards #ph-* svg -> branded WebP). v1.14.133 = Icon Stage 1 v2 (6 Ref cards, reflections stripped, 76px-in-96px).
